arts.ttl: Hull City stars handed unexpected chance in Championship relegation run-in
arts.sum: City were right to lodge an appeal because there have been enough inconsistencies in refereeing decisions this season to suggest Pedro could have got away with a yellow card. It's perhaps a good job they signed so many players capable of playing in attacking areas because with Louie Barry already sidelined for much of the rest of the season and now Pedro only available for the final seven games, those remaining will need to step up.

arts.ttl: Championship relegation scrap examined as Hull City boost survival hopes
arts.sum: After the damaging defeat at Cardiff City, the Tigers ' prospects of going down to League One increased markedly, but after taking seven points from their last nine games, including wins over relegation rivals Plymouth Argyle and Oxford, the bookies believe Ruben Selles' side will avoid the drop. According to Betfred, the Tigers have just under a six per cent chance of going down, while at the other end of the spectrum, despite their fine away win at Portsmouth, Argyle remain odds on favourites to go back down along with Luton Town and Cardiff.

arts.ttl: Hull City predicted XI for West Brom as Ruben Selles faces midfield conundrum
arts.sum: Puerta will sit the game at The Hawthorns with the Tigers looking for a first win at the home of the Baggies since 2012, along with Joao Pedro, who serves the second of a three-game ban for his sending off at Bristol City a week ago. Selles will be unable to call upon Gustavo Puerta after he was harshly given a second yellow card in the 97th minute of Wednesday night's 2-1 win over Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray fires West Brom warning ahead of big Hull City Hawthorns meeting
arts.sum: Mowbray is acutely aware of the threat posed by City despite their long list of absences, especially coming on the back of Albion's battling away draw at Turf Moor on Tuesday. "I'm very respectful of Hull having watched a few of their games, they play on the front foot, they're an aggressive team, it's not a game where they will come, sit everybody behind the ball and try to get a draw.

arts.ttl: ‘He understands’ – Tony Mowbray yet to hold contract talks with resurgent West Brom man
arts.sum: West Brom boss Tony Mowbray revealed he is yet to speak with John Swift over a new contract… The post ‘He understands’ – Tony Mowbray yet to hold contract talks with resurgent West Brom man appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City will be without seven players for West Brom meeting as absentee list grows
arts.sum: Now Cody Drameh has been added to that list with a knee injury he picked up before Wednesday night's win over Oxford United. Louie Barry damaged his knee in that win on Wearside, while Eliot Matazo ruptured his ACL at Cardiff City just a few days later.

arts.sum: Hull City are back in action this weekend with an away trip to The Hawthorns to face West… The post Slater back in: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face West Brom appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: ‘Could spring a surprise’ – West Brom vs Hull City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their West Brom vs Hull City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Saturday. The post ‘Could spring a surprise’ – West Brom vs Hull City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: In-form Hull City star speaks out on Gustavo Puerta controversy as focus switches to West Brom
arts.sum: Gelhardt was keen not to criticise the referee but felt the decision was wrong and says missing Puerta at West Brom on Saturday is a blow for the resurgent Tigers, who now have three wins in their past six games. On the game itself which saw City come from a goal down to win, with Gelhardt scoring the first before Puerta's clever movement and cross forced goalkeeper Jamie Cumming into a crucial error, the Leeds United loanee was pleased with his side's reaction, and has challenged them to go and get three points at West Brom on Saturday to end this four-game spell in style.

arts.ttl: Preview: West Bromwich Albion vs. Hull City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between West Bromwich Albion and Hull City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
